summary: Complete testing of Contract Required Attachments feature with all endpoints working correctly. Backend 13/13 tests passed. Frontend UI verified with attachments dialog showing progress, file list, and upload functionality.

issues: Non-blocking console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render

passed_tests: GET /api/contracts/{id}/required-attachments returns list with correct structure
GET /api/contracts/{id}/required-attachments returns correct attachment keys for veiculo_sem_motorista
Upload comprovante_pagamento marks all contract expenses as 'pago'
Creating contract with gerar_despesas=true auto-generates expense records
Contract expense parcelas match contract value
Frontend attachments dialog shows correct progress bar
Frontend attachments dialog shows all required documents with status
Frontend upload buttons work for missing attachments
seed_data_creation: Contract 43a7d7a8-651f-4029-9a7c-a0e8cbe9b9a4 used for testing with type veiculo_sem_motorista
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract attachments feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/contracts/{id}/required-attachments returns nested response with attachments array containing key, label, required, uploaded, attachment_id, attachment_info. 2) POST /api/contracts/{id}/attachments/{key} uploads file and updates contract.attachments dict. 3) Uploading comprovante_pagamento automatically marks all pending expenses for that contract as 'pago'. 4) Contract expenses endpoint returns nested structure {contract_id, expenses: [...], total_paid, total_pending}. 5) Frontend dialog shows nice progress bar and file list with upload/view/replace buttons. Resend API key is configured in backend/.env.

features_verified.get_required_attachments_endpoint: Working - returns list with progress tracking
features_verified.upload_specific_attachment_endpoint: Working - validates key, saves file, updates contract
features_verified.comprovante_pagamento_auto_payment: Working - marks expenses as 'pago' with attachment_id
features_verified.auto_expense_generation: Working - creates parcelas based on num_parcelas config
features_verified.frontend_attachments_dialog: Working - shows progress bar, file list, upload buttons
